memoryArtifacts.headline: Mary Bertha TIMS (THOMAS), Family Tree
memoryArtifacts.description: Family Tree: Mary Bertha TIMS (THOMAS), compiled by Mary Bertha Thomas (accompanied with a letter from M Evelyn Beard to James Elmer Tims dated 3 April 1994). [The original handwritten documents are in the possession of Wilma Beard, Hot Springs, Garland, Arkansas and used with permission. James Elmer Tims was living on Echo Point Road, Hot Springs, Garland Arkansas when the letter was written].
Mary Ann on the right & Mary Harriet on left.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Ann Shuffield於1827年10月4日出生在美國肯塔基州時，她的父親Henry W Shuffield33歲，母親Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning19歲。她於大約1843年與Jonathan D. Diffee在美國密西西比州提崇明格提崇明格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她於1900年住在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林亨德森 堂史普且於1910年住在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林瓦利 堂史普。她去世於1917年8月3日在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林比阿頓享年89歲，埋葬在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林比阿頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Ann Shuffield于1827年10月4日出生在美国肯塔基州时，她的父亲Henry W Shuffield33岁，母亲Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning19岁。她于大约1843年与Jonathan D. Diffee在美国密西西比州提崇明格提崇明格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她于1900年住在美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林亨德森 堂史普且于1910年住在美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林瓦利 堂史普。她去世于1917年8月3日在美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林比阿頓享年89岁，埋葬在美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林比阿頓。

nameMeanings.name: Shuffield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Sheffield  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Sheffield
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Sheffield (Yorkshire), but perhaps also from Sheffield Bottom in Burghfield (Berkshire), or Sheffield Park in Fletching (Sussex). The Yorkshire place takes its name from the river Sheaf, itself from Old English scēath ‘boundary’, + Old English feld ‘open country’, while the Berkshire placename derives from Old English scēo ‘shelter’ + feld. The Sussex placename comes from Old English scēap ‘sheep’ + feld.

historicEvents.title: Louisville and Portland Canal Opens
historicEvents.description: The Louisville and Portland canal opened in 1830. It was a 2 mile canal. It helped with the barrier caused by the Falls of the Ohio River at Louisville by making a route around them.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Triumph at the Falls: The Louisville and Portland Canal

historicEvents.description: Kentucky sided with the Union during the Civil War, even though it is a southern state.
Arkansas supplied an estimated 50,000 men to the Confederate Army andabout 15,000 to the Union Army.

historicEvents.title: The Mosaic Templar is Founded
historicEvents.description: The Mosaic Templar is an African American fraternal organization founded in Little Rock. it was founded by former slaves, John Edward Bush and Chester W. Keatts. It was part of a movement that was going on at the time, where everyone was forming fraternities and sororities. The main departments for this one where endowment, monument, analysis, uniform, rank, recapitulation, records, and a juvenile division.
historicEvents.urlTitle: The Encyclopedia of Arkansas History & Culture- Mosaic Templars of America

historicEvents.title: The Radio is invented
historicEvents.description: Kentucky native Nathan Stubblefield invented the radio in 1892
historicEvents.urlTitle: Nathan B. Stubblefield The Real Father of Radio

historicEvents.title: Governor Shot
historicEvents.description: On January 30, 1900 Governor William Goebel of Kentucky was assassinated. He took a bullet to the chest, outside the Old State Capitol. He died on February 3, 1900.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historical Crime Detective-The Murder of Kentucky Governor William Goebel, 1900

historicEvents.title: William H. Fuller Grows 70 Acres of Rice
historicEvents.description: Rice is one Arkansas leading crops, in 1904 William H. Fuller planted 70 acres of rice, this act is what started the making rice the leading crop in Arkansas.
historicEvents.urlTitle: The Encyclopedia of Arkansas History & Culture- Rice Industry

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Ann Shuffield was born on 4 October 1827, in Kentucky, United States, her father, Henry W Shuffield, was 33 and her mother, Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning, was 19. She married Jonathan D. Diffee about 1843, in Tishomingo, Tishomingo, Mississippi, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She lived in Henderson Township, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States in 1900 and Valley Township, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States in 1910. She died on 3 August 1917, in Beaton, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States, at the age of 89, and was buried in Beaton, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Ann Shuffieldが1827年10月4日にアメリカ合衆国ケンタッキー州で生まれた時，父Henry W Shuffieldは33歳，母Mary Harriet Whitehead Browningは19歳であった。約1843年にアメリカ合衆国ミシシッピ州ティショミンゴティショミンゴでJonathan D. Diffeeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1900年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングヘンダーソン トウンシュイップに，1910年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングヴァリー トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼女は1917年8月3日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングビートンで89歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングビートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Ann Shuffield(이)가 1827년 10월 4일 미국 켄터키 주에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry W Shuffield(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1843년 미국 미시시피 주 티쇼밍오 티쇼밍오에서 Jonathan D. Diffee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1900년도에 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 헨더슨 타운시프에서, 1910년도에 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 발리 타운시프에서 살았다. 그녀는 1917년 8월 3일 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 비턴에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 비턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Ann Shuffield nasceu em 4 de outubro de 1827, em Kentucky, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Henry W Shuffield, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Jonathan D. Diffee aproximadamente 1843, em Tishomingo, Tishomingo, Mississípi, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela viveu em Henderson Township, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1900 e em Valley Township, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1910. Ela faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1917, em Beaton, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Beaton, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Ann Shuffield родилась 4 октября 1827 г. в местности Кентукки, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Henry W Shuffield было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jonathan D. Diffee около 1843 г. в местности тишоминго, тишоминго, Миссисипи, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она жила в местности хендирсон тоуншип, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1900 году и в местности валли тоуншип, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1910 году. Она умерла 3 августа 1917 г. в местности битон, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности битон, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты.
